allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(b['name']\) for b in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['ref']\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['name'], '-', r['updated_at'][:10], '\(', r['visibility'], '\)'\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; commits=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['sha'][:7], c['commit']['message'][:60], '-', c['commit']['author']['date'][:10]\) for c in commits]")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "done")
